original_abstract: Owing to the significant biological activities, quinazoline derivatives have drawn more and more attention in the synthesis and bioactivities research. This review summarizes the recent advances in the synthesis and biological activities investigations of quinazoline derivatives. According to the main method the authors adopted in their research design, those synthetic methods were divided into five main classifications, including Aza-reaction, Microwave-assisted reaction, Metal-mediated reaction, Ultrasound-promoted reaction and Phase-transfer catalysis reaction. The biological activities of the synthesized quinazoline derivatives also are discussed.
humanized_abstract: Because of their significant biological activities, quinazoline derivatives have become a research focus in the field of organic synthesis and bioactivity research. This review discusses the recent progress in the synthesis and bioactivity of quinazoline derivatives. In this review, the literature was classified into five categories based on the method adopted by the authors in the design of the research: Aza-reaction, Microwave-assisted reaction, Metal-mediated reaction, Ultrasound-promoted reaction and Phase-transfer catalysis reaction. The bioactivity of the quinazoline derivatives is also discussed.

The bioactivity of the quinazoline derivatives is also discussed.
